en.value: Activity 1.1 Conducting an assessment of the presence of newly elected government converts (Ward and RM/MC level) and their capacity building needs1.2 Training/Capacity Building incl. refresher training on rights/claims with focus on right to food & information (right-based approach), SDG 2&5 for civil society groups/networks and for the local government (Ward & RM/MC level) 1.3 Training/Capacity Building including refresher training on good governance principles, accountability tools and Core Humanitarian Standards (CHS) for CBOs/civil society groups/networks and for the local government (Ward & RM/MC level) 1.4 Participatory annual planning & budgeting at Ward and RM/MC level 1.5 Participatory Organisational Capacity Assessment Programme (POCAP) 1.6 Information campaigns  1.7 Strengthening of community monitoring groups (RtF awareness raising) 1.8 Forum for citizens' complaints 1.9 Multi-Stakeholder Joint Monitoring  1.10 Third Party MonitoringActivity 2.1 Capacity building for local resource people (LRPs) and development / establishment of integrated multi-purpose plant schools 2.2 Promotion of Agro-Vet development: mobile and stationary shops 2.3 Promotion of better practices and technologies (SIFFS)2.4 Development of collection points, entrepreneurial capacities, sales markets, processing and post-harvest management methods (Value addition) 2.5 Digital agricultural services and market accessActivity 3.1 Participatory Food and Nutrition Security Learning and Action (PLA) 3.2 Promoting appropriate breastfeeding practices: early initiation, exclusive and continuous breastfeeding3.3 Awareness raising of nutritional awareness through training and mobilization of FCHVs (Female Community Health Workers), local resource people and change agents.3.4 Provide training, follow-up and input on vegetable gardening

en.full: Strengthening Resilience of Disadvantaged Population groups in Mugu and Bajura districts, Western Nepal

version_summary.change_description: Initial sourcing from MoF DFMIS API
